headline: Corning Stock Rises 173.9% in a Year: Should You Invest Now?
summary: GLW rides AI data center demand, Gorilla Glass innovation and solar expansion, but heavy capex plans and customer concentration raise questions after its big run.

headline: Amphenol’s Acquisition Spree Targets AI Data Centers And Tests Valuation
summary: Amphenol (NYSE:APH) has moved to expand through five acquisitions in 2025. In January 2026, it acquired CommScope’s Connectivity and Cable Solutions business. The CommScope CCS deal adds fiber optic interconnect and cable capabilities focused on data centers. The company is aiming to deepen its exposure to AI driven and large scale data center markets. For investors watching NYSE:APH, the recent acquisition push is a clear attempt to reshape the business mix around connectivity for high...

headline: Jensen Quality Growth Equity Divested Amphenol (APH) Due to Elevated Valuation
summary: Jensen Investment Management, an asset management company based in the US, released its fourth-quarter investor letter for “Jensen Quality Growth Equity Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The S&P 500 Index continued its rally in Q4 2025, which started in 2022. The Jensen Quality Growth Equity Composite underperformed the Index in […]

headline: The Market Just Got Riskier -- And I Couldn't Be More Bullish
summary: Market anxiety over Iran oil shocks and stagflation may be creating cyclical value stock bargains.
